name: John McKinzie
role: Lead Pastor, Hope Fellowship Church, Frisco, Texas
incident: John McKinzie, 59, lead pastor of Hope Fellowship Church in Frisco, Texas, resigned on September 14, 2025 after confessing to 'sexual sin and moral failure' during a meeting with church leadership. He was the second pastor at the same megachurch to step down over similar circumstances in 2025. Church elders stated no one on staff had any prior knowledge of the moral failure before McKinzie disclosed it.
